theorem statistics_testing_basic_route_package_intro :
  forall (Prerequisite : Prop), forall (Intermediate : Prop), forall (Conclusion : Prop), forall (prerequisite_law : Prerequisite), forall (prerequisite_to_intermediate : Prerequisite -> Intermediate), forall (intermediate_to_conclusion : Intermediate -> Conclusion), @StatisticsTestingBasicRoutePackage Prerequisite Intermediate Conclusion :=
  fun Prerequisite => fun Intermediate => fun Conclusion => fun prerequisite_law => fun prerequisite_to_intermediate => fun intermediate_to_conclusion => fun (P : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (prerequisite_law : Prerequisite), forall (prerequisite_to_intermediate : Prerequisite -> Intermediate), forall (intermediate_to_conclusion : Intermediate -> Conclusion), P) => mk prerequisite_law prerequisite_to_intermediate intermediate_to_conclusion
